dataset: Loghub, SecRepo, and Splunk Buttercup Games

pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py exact string match check
Task description and verifier.py input_count requirement
Task description and verifier.py panel_count requirement
export_result.sh strictly checks for either 'security_logs' or 'web_logs'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world log data (SecRepo, Loghub, Splunk Buttercup Games). The required dashboard must be named 'Security_Investigation_Workbook', contain at least 2 form inputs and 3 panels, query either the 'security_logs' or 'web_logs' indexes, and be accessible via user 'admin' with password 'SplunkAdmin1!', which are pre-seeded in the Splunk setup.
